examples: Three species of tilapia thrive there part-time.
Before raising tilapia, the ponds were filled with shrimp.
He serves non-Chinese tilapia at his restaurant, like fish tacos.
Their inland shrimp farm uses another fish, the tilapia, to mop up the shrimps' waste.
In Aspen you really can have it all, from champagne to PBR, tilapia to tacos.
